tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: OUR CHANGING CLIMATE
tasks.text: Climate change is one of the most 1.1. ________ problems facing our planet today. Scientists can now make accurate 1.2. ________ about future weather patterns using powerful computers. Global 1.3. ________ is causing temperatures to rise every year. 1.4. ________ disasters such as floods and hurricanes are becoming more frequent. Air 1.5. ________ from factories and cars is a major cause of these changes. In some regions, 1.6. ________ weather brings heavy snow and ice, while other areas experience 1.7. ________ days with no rain for months. The 1.8. ________ of forests for farming also makes the problem worse. We all need to act now to protect our environment.
